Advertorial

"I Loved These Portable Speakers So Much I Bought a Pair for All Five of My Grown Kids."

Sponsored by TikiTunes

This new portable speaker will be sure to have your friends saying “Wow! Where did you get that?!”

Sometimes an innovative product comes along that’s just so cool you almost have no choice but to get it! And as far as I’m concerned, THIS is absolutely one of those products!

Why, you ask?

It’s simple – instant ambiance! When you want to relax and chill, what are the two things you think of first to help set the mood? That’s right…lighting and music!

After all, nothing says ‘slow down, relax, and appreciate all that life has to offer’ better than the soft glow of the flickering flames from a Tiki Torch.

On the other hand, music can instantly alter your mood and state of mind. So which do you choose – music or lighting? Hmm…decisions, decisions.

Well, decision time is over! Because now you can enjoy BOTH at the same time. 

What is it?

TikiTunes – the portable speaker designed to look like a tiki torch. In addition to syncing with your smartphone, tablet, or laptop to play your favorite tunes, TikiTunes features a flickering LED light that looks just like a candle on a breezy beach night.

Now I’m able to enjoy the soft glow of the flickering flames of a Tiki Torch while it ALSO fills the air with the music of my choice.

Unlike the boxy Bluetooth speakers that are a blight on your bookshelf, TikiTunes looks just as natural sitting on a bookshelf as a tiki bar.

How does it work?

TikiTunes syncs with your phone, tablet, laptop, or any Bluetooth-enabled device, including both Androids and iPhones. It uses a 2000 mAh rechargeable battery that lets you continuously stream music for up to 6 hours or more!

The coolest feature is that you can even sync two TikiTunes with each other to create stereo sound!

I initially bought just one TikiTunes speaker, but after I saw how well it worked, I had to go back and order a second. The stereo sound enhances the listening experience and makes a big difference at parties. And, sound quality is just one of the ways TikiTunes exceeded my expectations.

TikiTunes is super lightweight and portable. And because these speakers are dust-tight and water-resistant, I don’t have to worry about taking them to the beach, the park, or anywhere else.

Also it's 5-watt speaker is surprisingly powerful. It has strong bass and an exceptional midrange. The volume is good, and you can still hear the music playing over a loud party!

But music isn’t the only reason we use TikiTunes. The LED light works with or without music. So even when we want a quiet evening in, we still set out TikiTunes.

The LED light gently flickers like a candle, so I’ve made these speakers the centerpiece of our dinner table and set them on the coffee table to create a cozy atmosphere in the living room. It’s made our home feel more like a sanctuary.

TikiTunes is everything I could want from both a Bluetooth speaker and an LED light, all wrapped up in one product. And I’m not the only one who thinks so. This little speaker even won an Editor’s Choice Award from Innovation and Tech Today.

What else I love about TikiTunes

  • The Sound Quality Will Surprise You – TikiTunes packs an impressive high-quality sound. The surprisingly punchy bass (for a small speaker) and the exciting mid-range will have you listening for hours.
  • You Can Pair Speakers Together (Customer Favorite!) – This unique and fun  feature lets you easily pair two TikiTunes together for a true stereo-sound.
  • It Makes Any Atmosphere Way Cooler – The warm LED light flickers just like a fire and creates the perfect ambiance. Plus – it works with or without music!
  • You Can Take It Everywhere (Indoors & Outdoors) – Portable and lightweight, it’s perfect for any trip. It’s also certified and proven to be dust tight and protected from water. Enjoy your music in rain, sun, or snow.
  • It Keeps Going and Going – The high-quality 2000mAh rechargeable battery allows music to play continuously for at least 6 hours (but many customers report up to 10 hours of play time).
  • It's So Easy, Anyone Can Use It – The buttons are large, easy to press, and straightforward – anyone can understand it (from little kids to non-techy adults).
  • It Works With Apple & Android Devices – TikiTunes works with any bluetooth device.
  • Their 30-Day Money Back Guarantee & 1 Year Warranty – If for any reason you’re not 100% satisfied, you can easily return it, hassle-free!
